name: nb-notes
title: nb
description: Browse, search, and manage notes, bookmarks, and todos with nb
author: Keyruu

commands.name: list-notes
commands.title: List Notes
commands.description: Browse and manage notes in your nb notebooks

commands.name: search-notes
commands.title: Search Notes
commands.description: Full-text search across your nb notebooks

commands.name: add-note
commands.title: Add Note
commands.description: Create a new note in nb

commands.name: add-todo
commands.title: Add Todo
commands.description: Create a new todo in nb

commands.name: list-todos
commands.title: List Todos
commands.description: Browse and manage todos with status filtering

preferences.name: terminalAppId
preferences.title: Terminal App ID
preferences.description: Application ID for the terminal to use when editing notes (e.g. com.raggesilver.BlackBox, org.gnome.Terminal)
